text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
This school is filled with nothing but 
the best of the best horsegirls…

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It makes my heart skip a beat. 
But I'm not scared… I'm excited.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Racing everyone here is so much fun, 
even more fun than back in Kasamatsu.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Watch me, Trainer. I swear… I will win!
